summary: Completed comprehensive testing of refactored Agile Ortho API. Backend was refactored from monolithic 2200-line server.py into modular route files (public.py, admin.py, chat.py, imports.py, whatsapp.py). All 28 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including Admin Products page with new image upload features.

backend_api: GET /api/divisions - returns divisions with categories and product counts
GET /api/products with division filter - filters correctly
POST /api/admin/login - returns token with correct password
GET /api/admin/stats - returns 306 products, leads count, division breakdown
GET /api/admin/pipeline - returns lead pipeline by status
GET /api/admin/leads with filters - filters by score
POST /api/chat - chatbot responds with product references
frontend_ui: Admin login page loads and accepts password
Admin dashboard shows 306 products, 17 total leads, lead breakdown
Admin Products page loads with 306 products in catalog
Products table has Images column header
Bulk Images button present in header
Edit drawer shows Product Images section with upload button
Bulk Image Upload modal opens with SKU auto-matching instructions
Bulk upload modal has Select image files button
Bulk upload modal has Upload & Match button

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routes completed successfully
All routes properly use async/await for MongoDB operations
Authentication via admin_required dependency works correctly across all admin endpoints
Image upload endpoints properly validate file types and sizes (ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES, MAX_IMAGE_SIZE)
Object storage integration via helpers.py (put_object, get_object) is functional
Bulk image upload auto-matches by SKU code prefix - good UX pattern
seed_data_creation: Test products and leads created during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored from monolithic server.py into modular route files: routes/public.py (health, divisions, products, leads, files), routes/admin.py (login, stats, CRUD, image upload), routes/chat.py (RAG chatbot), routes/imports.py (PDF import), routes/whatsapp.py (WhatsApp integration). All 306 products in database. Image upload via object storage working. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_routes.py covers all refactored endpoints.

new_structure.server.py: Entry point, CORS, router includes, startup events (~70 lines)
new_structure.helpers.py: Auth, serialization, scoring, object storage functions
new_structure.routes/public.py: Public endpoints (health, divisions, products, leads, files)
new_structure.routes/admin.py: Admin endpoints (login, stats, CRUD, image upload)

new_features: POST /api/admin/products/bulk-images - bulk upload with SKU auto-matching
GET /api/files/{path} - serve files from object storage
